articles.title: Nvidia 推出 NemoClaw：更安全的 OpenClaw 版本
articles.originalTitle: Nvidia is launching NemoClaw, a more secure version of OpenClaw
articles.summary: Nvidia 在 GTC 大会上宣布推出 NemoClaw，这是一个为 OpenClaw 添加隐私和安全保护的 AI 代理平台，通过在"隔离沙盒"环境中运行来增强安全性。
articles.originalSummary: Nvidia announced it's launching NemoClaw, an agentic AI platform that adds privacy and security protections to OpenClaw by running it in an isolated sandbox environment.

articles.title: DLSS 5 看起来像是视频游戏的实时生成式 AI 滤镜
articles.originalTitle: DLSS 5 looks like a real-time generative AI filter for video games
articles.summary: Nvidia 刚刚宣布了 DLSS 5，Digital Foundry 已经发布了评测视频。这项技术使用实时神经渲染模型为像素注入逼真的光照和材质。
articles.originalSummary: Nvidia's also got a whole blog post dedicated to the real-time neural rendering model that infuses pixels with photoreal lighting and materials.

articles.title: 苹果收购 MotionVFX，第三方 Final Cut Pro 插件开发商
articles.originalTitle: Apple has acquired MotionVFX, a third-party Final Cut Pro plugin developer
articles.summary: MotionVFX 在其网站上宣布加入苹果团队。该公司开发了 Final Cut Pro 的工具套件，包括 AI 放大和字幕等 AI 功能。
articles.originalSummary: MotionVFX announced on its website that it's joining the Apple team. MotionVFX is the developer behind a suite of tools for Apple-owned Final Cut Pro, including several AI features.

articles.title: 特斯拉网红们正在离开"邪教"
articles.originalTitle: The Tesla Influencers Leaving the 'Cult'
articles.summary: 电动汽车制造商拥有一个强大的在线社区支持。但 Elon Musk 的政治立场和对全自动驾驶的过度炒作正在让一些忠实粉丝离开。
articles.originalSummary: The EV manufacturer is supported by a robust online community. But Elon Musk's politics and overblown hype about Full Self-Driving are turning some loyalists away.

articles.title: 华尔街已经在押注预测市场

articles.originalSummary: As the legal war over how to regulate prediction markets rages on, financial institutions are embracing the industry anyway.

articles.title: COBOL 是编程语言中的石棉
articles.originalTitle: COBOL Is the Asbestos of Programming Languages
articles.summary: 这种古老的编程语言仍然在关键系统中运行，就像石棉一样难以清除。
articles.originalSummary: The old programming language still runs in critical systems, and like asbestos, it's hard to remove.
